Lot Clearing & Land Clearing in Concord, NC

Full lot clearing for new construction, driveways, outbuildings, and landscaping projects. Residential and commercial properties.

Call (704) 313-1555 Get Free Estimate

Clear Your Land the Right Way

Whether you're building a new home, adding a detached garage, expanding your driveway, or preparing land for landscaping, proper lot clearing is the essential first step. Our crew handles everything from selective tree removal to full brush and undergrowth clearing, leaving your property graded and ready for the next phase.

Lot Clearing Services We Offer

  • Full lot clearing: Remove all trees, brush, and vegetation for new construction
  • Selective clearing: Keep specific trees while removing the rest
  • Underbrush removal: Clear vines, brush, and small growth from wooded lots
  • Fence line clearing: Clear growth along property lines for fence installation
  • Driveway clearing: Cut a path for new driveway installation

Why Professional Land Clearing Matters

DIY lot clearing is dangerous, slow, and often incomplete. Professional equipment and experienced operators clear land faster, safer, and more thoroughly. We also handle stump grinding, root removal, and can coordinate with your contractor for grading and site prep.

Lot Clearing Costs in Concord

Costs vary based on lot size, tree density, terrain, and access. Typical residential lot clearing runs $1,500 to $5,000+ per acre. Smaller projects like driveway cuts or fence line clearing start around $800. We provide detailed quotes after an on-site walkthrough.

Typical Cost

$1,500 – $5,000+

Exact quotes provided free after on-site assessment.
